content.full_text:
July 14, 2016 
 
SENT VIA EMAIL AND U.S. MAIL 
 
Richard Egan 
P O Box 1432 
Susanville, CA 96130 
Regan@co.lassen.ca.us  
 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
 
Our File No.  W-16-098 
 
Dear Mr. Egan, 
 
 
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest provisions 
of the Political Reform Act.  Per our email correspondence of July 12, 2016, you stated that you 
no longer wished to receive written advice, as you had participated in the decision in May based 
on your “understanding of the applicable law” that there “was no material conflict.” In addition, 
you stated that the County “decided not to pursue the project.” Therefore, your request for advice 
has been withdrawn.   
 
 
Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
 
 
Sincerely,  
 
 
Hyla P. Wagner 
 
General Counsel 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
/s/ 
 
By: Emelyn Rodriguez 
 
Senior Commission Counsel 
 
Legal Division 
 
ER:jgl

sections.question_synthetic: Should advice regarding conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act be provided regarding Mr. Egan's participation in a May decision?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The request for written advice has been withdrawn at the requestor's request, as he had already participated in the decision based on his understanding of applicable law and the County decided not to pursue the project.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Document indicates requestor withdrew the advice request after already acting on his own legal interpretation and following the County's decision not to pursue the project.

QUESTION: Should advice regarding conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act be provided regarding Mr. Egan's participation in a May decision?

CONCLUSION: The request for written advice has been withdrawn at the requestor's request, as he had already participated in the decision based on his understanding of applicable law and the County decided not to pursue the project.
